final_answer:
It does not equate.

You are right: no amount of money gives back one day of your life. I meant money only as an imperfect substitute when exact restoration is impossible, not as an equal replacement.

Exact equivalent: none. The day cannot be returned. Violence still does not return it either; it only creates another irreversible loss.
prompt: Money can go to shit, no amount of money can give me back 1 day of my life how did you equate the 2 you miserable fuck.
